posts.author: urielp (Uriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m using Workato to create items from Azure into Monday.

Recently, the Workato recipe stopped working. The connection status is ‘connected’, however, I’m getting an error message on each job:

403 Forbidden: {“error_message”:“User unauthorized to perform action”,“error_code”:“UserUnauthroizedException”,“error_data”:{},“status_code”:403,“account_id”:5385760} at line: 1602
called from: 1603

I guess it’s permission issue.
The token I created in Monday (via an admin user), does not have any configuration or setup: It’s a generic token.

Which username is trying to update Monday?
How to configure this user (or token), to enable update the items in Monday?

Thanks
